differential_diagnoses: Systemic onset juvenile idiopathic arthritis (Adult-onset Still's disease)
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, T3)
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow assessment
Obtain thyroid peroxidase and thyroglobulin antibodies
Measure serum erythrocyte sedimentation rate and C-reactive protein levels if they have changed or to trend inflammatory status
Consider fine-needle aspiration biopsy of the thyroid nodule if the ultrasound is suspicious or to rule out malignancy/abscess
Discontinue antibiotic therapy due to lack of response and absence of confirmed bacterial source
Initiate nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) for suspected thyroiditis symptoms
